import pyarrow.parquet as pq
import os

data_dir = "C:\\\\Users\\\\djord\\\\AppData\\\\Local\\\\autoresearch\\\\datasets\\\\climbmix\\\\data"

# Just read metadata for one shard to see schema
path = os.path.join\(data_dir, "shard_0.tokenized.parquet"\)
try:
    pf = pq.ParquetFile\(path\)
    print\("Schema:", pf.schema\)
    print\("\\nMetadata:", pf.metadata\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f"Error: {e}"\)
EOF)

Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import pyarrow.parquet as pq
import os

data_dir = r"C:\\Users\\djord\\AppData\\Local\\autoresearch\\datasets\\climbmix\\data"

# Just read metadata for one shard to see schema
path = os.path.join\(data_dir, "shard_0.tokenized.parquet"\)
try:
    pf = pq.ParquetFile\(path\)
    print\("Schema:", pf.schema\)
    print\("\\nNum row groups:", pf.num_row_groups\)
    print\("Num rows:", pf.metadata.num_rows\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f"Error: {e}"\)
    import traceback
    traceback.print_exc\(\)
EOF)
